title: eriophyllum integrifolium
intro: Eriophyllum integrifolium, also known as Woolly Sunflower or Woolly-leaved Gum Plant, is a perennial shrubby plant native to the southwestern United States and Baja California. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Eriophyllum integrifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively in herbal preparations.
